context.projectOverview: RETRY (iteration 2) of Sprint 2 — TS architect Checkpoint 2 synthesis panel. Iteration 1 (commit 6f82cea) PASSED C1/C3/C4 but FAILED C2 on a single missing test assertion. The implementation is correct; only a test is missing. Do the MINIMUM to satisfy C2 without breaking the passing criteria.

evaluatorFeedback.rootCause: The C2 on-path tests assert call-count (N+2) and peak concurrency <= maxConcurrent, but NO test asserts that the selected approach equals synthesize(approaches, lensScores).winner. The implementation at architect-agent.ts:620 calls synthesize() correctly and threads synthesisResult.winner into the continuation prompt, but this winner-threading is untested. C2's contract text explicitly requires this assertion.
fixOptions: Option A (PREFERRED): add an additive OPTIONAL `selectedApproach?: string` field to the ArchitectResult interface; populate it in runArchitectPanel with synthesisResult.winner (leave it undefined on the off path); then add a C2 test that calls synthesize(sameApproaches, sameLensScores) directly with the SAME mock data the panel saw and asserts result.selectedApproach === synthesize(...).winner. This makes the winner observable and keeps the off path lensScores/selectedApproach both undefined.
Option B: in the on-path test, capture the continuation runAgenticLoop call args (loopSpy.mock.calls[N+1]) and assert its userMessage contains the synthesize() winner string.
constraints: Do NOT break the passing C1 (off-path single-call), C3 (lensScores additive optional, CP1/3/4/5 run), or C4 (tsc/build/lint/full suite green) tests.

If you add selectedApproach to ArchitectResult, it MUST be additive optional (off path leaves it undefined) — re-verify the C3 'result without lensScores/selectedApproach validates' expectation still holds.
Keep the change minimal — this is a one-assertion (and optionally one-field) fix.

gitNote: Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist. Stage ONLY: git add src/orchestrator/architect-agent.ts src/orchestrator/architect-agent.test.ts. NEVER `git add -A`. Branch bober/architect-lens-panel — never main. Commit message: bober(sprint-2): assert CP2 selected approach == synthesize().winner (iter 2).
